entries.objective: To make my English clearer and fix grammar mistakes, translating my language to a more academic way
entries.prompt: I asked the AI to improve my sentences and make them sound more suitable for an academic paper without changing what I meant
entries.ai_output_summary: AI corrected grammar and suggested clearer sentences for the WCET explanations

actions: I compared the new sentences with my original meaning and changed parts that sounded too formal or unnatural

issues: Some sentences sounded too formal and unnecessarily complex

entries.reflection: AI helped make the text clear but I still changed some parts to match my own writing style, It was useful because I never wrote a 5 page long scientific paper before and I am not very good at scientific/academic level English
